title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes frontend development tasks to Claude Opus for planning and integration logic, and Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design and code generation. The approach leverages each model's relative strengths while reducing overall inference costs.
